data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for lead source provenance for follow-up teams, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for lead source provenance, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented or operational. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of lead source provenance for follow-up teams.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
